# incident_schedule_sync_target (Resource)

Manage schedule sync targets (Slack user groups that schedules can sync to).

The schedule sync target API has no update endpoint, so every writable attribute on this resource (`slack_user_group_id`, `add_bot_to_group`) is marked as requiring replacement. Changing any of them will destroy and recreate the target.

Destroying a sync target — including via the destroy-then-create that a replacement performs — will fail with HTTP 422 if any `incident_schedule_sync_rule` references it. Remove those rules first, or migrate them to a different target, before changing this resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `add_bot_to_group` (Boolean) Whether the incident.io bot should be added to the group. Changing this attribute forces the sync target to be destroyed and recreated; the destroy step will fail if any sync rules reference the target.
- `slack_user_group_id` (String) Slack ID for the user group synced to. Changing this attribute forces the sync target to be destroyed and recreated; the destroy step will fail if any sync rules reference the target.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the sync target
- `slack_team_id` (String) Slack team ID for the user group
